name: @coreblow/corehub
description: Skill and plugin directory for CoreBlow
author: Febrinanda and CoreBlow contributors

scripts.test:persistence: npm run validate:write-schema && npm run smoke:persistence-migration
scripts.validate:ops: node --check src/api-server.mjs && node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/state-store-bootstrap.mjs && node --check src/worker.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-incident-check.mjs && node --check scripts/corehub-cli-npm-release-check.mjs && node --check scripts/corehub-d1-migration.mjs && node --check scripts/corehub-production-seed.mjs && node --check scripts/deploy-worker-check.mjs && node --check scripts/materialize-worker-config.mjs && node --check scripts/persistence-snapshot.mjs && node --check scripts/production-drill-rehearsal.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-admin-ui.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-audit-alert-pipeline.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-publisher-ui.mjs && node --check scripts/test-surface.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-persistence-migration.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-worker-local.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-worker-post-deploy.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-production-finalization.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-worker-deploy-readiness.mjs && node --check ops/cloudflare/audit-incident-worker.mjs && node --check ops/cloudflare/audit-alert-adapters.mjs && node scripts/validate-audit-alert-schema.mjs && node scripts/validate-worker-deploy-readiness.mjs --template && node scripts/validate-production-finalization.mjs
